title: AP Capital City Works — Taking Over Within 7 Days of Completion Certificate
text_english: The EMPLOYER SHALL TAKE OVER the SITE and the WORKS within {{takeover_days}} (default 7) DAYS of the Engineer-in-Charge's issuing a CERTIFICATE OF COMPLETION. The Contractor SHALL SUBMIT to the Project Manager a DETAILED ACCOUNT of the total amount that the Contractor considers payable under the Contract at the END OF THE DEFECTS LIABILITY PERIOD. The Project Manager SHALL ISSUE a DEFECTS LIABILITY CERTIFICATE and CERTIFY any FINAL PAYMENT due to the Contractor.
